gate.check: Verify you understand the full scope before writing code
Confirm target files exist and are within your assigned scope
If anything is unclear, state assumptions explicitly
No files modified outside assigned scope
Do not touch files owned by other agents
If you need something from another scope, import it — do not modify it
Flag any blocker that requires out-of-scope changes
If a task cannot be completed, document why clearly
Do not force broken code through — report the blocker
Include error messages and what was attempted
